skills.name: daily-status
skills.description: Generate the end-of-day client status report by scanning today's git commits, uncommitted changes, and GitHub PRs, then interviewing the user to classify each item. Use whenever the user asks for their daily status, EOD report, or client update — or types /daily-status.
skills.author: Shilpa VP

skills.name: qa-handoff
skills.description: Use after a PR merges to dev to generate a QA test plan inlined into a new GitHub issue assigned to the named QA user. Sets the project status to "Ready for QA" and removes the issue from the auto-added project. QA reads the plan in the issue, ticks a Pass/Fail/Blocked checkbox, and closes the issue. Triggers — "QA handoff", "notify QA about this PR", "send QA test plan", "tell QA to test PR
skills.author: Rajashekhar V

skills.name: tech-mentor
skills.description: Researches industry patterns for engineering decisions. Use when evaluating architecture choices, comparing approaches, or understanding what companies do before building something.
skills.author: Vishnu BV
